title: Upstox Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Upstox Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Upstox Asia Pacific Associates in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox Asia Pacific Associates:
Upstox Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
